items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 9 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「AWS GraphRAG deployment cuts drug research cycles by 87%」、「Harness VLA: Steering Frozen VLAs into Reliable Manipulation Primitives via Memory-Guided Agents」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: AWS GraphRAG deployment cuts drug research cycles by 87%
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「大模型训练、推理、RAG、后训练或评测」。原文摘要显示：A recent AWS GraphRAG deployment reduced drug research and development cycles in pharmaceutical environments by 87 percent. This acceleration is achieved by integrating previously separated proprietary databases into a …
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: Harness VLA: Steering Frozen VLAs into Reliable Manipulation Primitives via Memory-Guided Agents
items.summary: Language-conditioned manipulation requires both precise contact-rich control and robust reasoning over language, scenes, and long horizons. End-to-end Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide strong local visuomotor skills, but they are trained on in-distribution task traject…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Cloud Use:当 Agent 开始真正使用云
items.summary: Agent 调一次云 API 并不难.难的是,让它每天调、半夜调、跨系... 技术上,给它足够权限就能做,但恰巧真正的风险也藏在这里....
